creator: bu7cher@yandex.ru
text:
The last available driver version (b9179) have support for IBM ServeRAID 8K, I and L adapters.
http://www.adaptec.gr/en-US/downloads/unix/freebsd?productId=SAS-4805

From freebsd-current@:

I've merged some changes from this driver to RELENG_6 sources.
I've created a custom FreeBSD 6.2-BETA1 ISO image with a my
patch to aac(4).
Now i've successfully installed FreeBSD to my new IBM x3650
with an IBM ServeRAID-8k controller. I think that this patch
can be successfully applied to CURRENT sources.

Fix: 

Patch can be found here:
http://butcher.heavennet.ru/patches/kernel/aac/
How-To-Repeat: FreeBSD don't recognize of some lastest Adaptec adapters.
